taxRegime.description: PPN: Pajak Pertambahan Nilai (VAT), standard 11%. PPNBM: Pajak Penjualan atas Barang Mewah (luxury goods tax). PPH22: Income tax on import/certain transactions. PPH23: Withholding tax on services. PPN_FINAL: Final PPN for specific categories (e.g. certain construction). EXEMPT: No tax applicable (basic foods, books, health services).

taxCategory.description: BKP: Barang Kena Pajak — taxable goods. JKP: Jasa Kena Pajak — taxable services. NON_BKP: Non-taxable goods or services.

taxRate.description: Tax rate as decimal fraction. The applicable rate MUST be sourced from current Indonesian tax regulation (DJP / PMK), not hardcoded. For reference, PPN standard is currently 0.11 (11%) per PMK 131/2024; PPnBM rates vary by category (typical range 0.10 to 0.75). This field documents the rate actually charged on this transaction.
taxRate.x-ion-condition: Required when taxRegime is not EXEMPT

taxAmount.x-ion-condition: Required when taxRegime is not EXEMPT

taxIncluded.description: Whether the tax amount is already included in the item price (tax-inclusive pricing) or added on top (tax-exclusive).

eFakturRef.description: e-Invoice reference (Faktur Pajak) number from DJP e-Faktur system. Format: XXX.XXX-YY.XXXXXXXX where XXX is kode faktur. Only applicable for PKP sellers.

taxBaseAmount.description: The amount on which tax is calculated (before tax)
taxBaseAmount.x-ion-condition: Required for proper tax computation trail
